reasoning: Billie Eilish achieved a massive milestone of crossing 100M monthly Spotify listeners in mid-2024, but 'top Spotify artist' (most total streams in a year) heavily biases towards artists with large catalogs and super-fan streaming behavior (like Taylor Swift, Bad Bunny, and Drake). Billie Eilish currently ranks around 9th all-time for total streams and was 6th in daily Spotify streams globally in early 2025. Without a 100+ track catalog or an unprecedented, sustained daily performance throughout 2025, it is extremely unlikely she will overtake consistent heavyweights like Swift or Bad Bunny in cumulative yearly streams for 2025.
